verse.verse_14: Żūqū fitnatakum, hāżal-lażī kuntum bihī tasta‘jilūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Ākhiżīna mā ātāhum rabbuhum, innahum kānū qabla żālika muḥsinīn(a).
verse.verse_19: Wa fī amwālihim ḥaqqul lis-sā'ili wal-maḥrūm(i).
verse.verse_22: Wa fis-samā'i rizqukum wa mā tū‘adūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Fa wa rabbis-samā'i wal-arḍi innahū laḥaqqum miṡla mā annakum tanṭiqūn(a).
verse.verse_25: Iż dakhalū ‘alaihi fa qālū salāmā(n), qāla salām(un), qaumum munkarūn(a).
verse.verse_26: Farāga ilā ahlihī fa jā'a bi‘ijlin samīn(in).
verse.verse_27: Fa qarrabahū ilaihim, qāla alā ta'kulūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Fa aujasa minhum khīfah(tan), qālū lā takhaf, wa basysyarūhu bigulāmin ‘alīm(in).
verse.verse_29: Fa aqbalatimra'atuhū fī ṣarratin fa ṣakkat wajhahā wa qālat ‘ajūzun ‘aqīm(un).
verse.verse_30: Qālū każālik(i), qāla rabbuk(i), innahū huwal-ḥakīmul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_32: Qālū innā ursilnā ilā qaumim mujrimīn(a).
verse.verse_35: Fa akhrajnā man kāna fīhā minal-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_36: Famā wajadnā fīhā gaira baitim minal-muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_37: Wa taraknā fīhā āyatal lil-lażīna yakhāfūnal-‘ażābal-alīm(a).
verse.verse_38: Wa fī mūsā iż arsalnāhu ilā fir‘auna bisulṭānim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_39: Fa tawallā biruknihī wa qāla sāḥirun au majnūn(un).
verse.verse_40: Fa akhażnāhu wa junūdahū fanabażnāhum fil-yammi wa huwa mulīm(un).
verse.verse_42: Mā tażaru min syai'in atat ‘alaihi illā ja‘alathu kar-ramīm(i).
verse.verse_43: Wa fī ṡamūda iż qīla lahum tamatta‘ū ḥattā ḥīn(in).
verse.verse_44: Fa‘atau ‘an amri rabbihim fa akhażathumuṣ-ṣā‘iqatu wa hum yanẓurūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Famastaṭā‘ū min qiyāmiw wa mā kānū muntaṣirīn(a).
verse.verse_46: Wa qauma nūḥim min qabl(u), innahum kānū qauman fāsiqīn(a).
verse.verse_47: Was-samā'a banaināhā bi'aidiw wa innā lamūsi‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Wa min kulli syai'in khalaqnā zaujaini la‘allakum tażakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_50: Fa firrū ilallāh(i), innī lakum minhu nażīrum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_51: Wa lā taj‘alū ma‘allāhi ilāhan ākhar(a), innī lakum minhu nażīrum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_52: Każālika mā atal-lażīna min qablihim mir rasūlin illā qālū sāḥirun au majnūn(un).
verse.verse_53: Atawāṣau bih(ī), bal hum qaumun ṭāgūn(a).
verse.verse_56: Wa mā khalaqtul-jinna wal-insa illā liya‘budūn(i).
verse.verse_57: Mā urīdu minhum mir rizqiw wa mā urīdu ay yuṭ‘imūn(i).
verse.verse_59: Fa inna lil-lażīna ẓalamū żanūbam miṡla żanūbi aṣḥābihim falā yasta‘jilūn(i).
verse.verse_60: Fa wailul lil-lażīna kafarū miy yaumihimul-lażī yū‘adūn(a).
